title: polygala vulgaris var. multicaulis
intro: Polygala vulgaris var. multicaulis, also known as common polygala or multiflowered polygala, is a perennial herb belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Polygala vulgaris var. multicaulis include its ability to support immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit potential neuroprotective effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
